projects.name: Kosmolab
descriptions: All-in-one platform connecting artists, organizers and talent scouts — portfolios, calls for projects, events, services, shop and blog.
Lead developer on the project: technical direction, architecture decisions and coordination of a small delivery team.

TypeScript monorepo (Yarn Workspaces + Turborepo): Next.js 14 (web), Expo / React Native (mobile), NestJS (REST API + Swagger), packages share logic and UI components (Tamagui) with a cross-platform design system.
PostgreSQL / PostGIS (Prisma), Redis cache, real-time messaging (Socket.IO), Stripe payments, React Email / Brevo, i18n languages support.
AWS end-to-end: EC2 (API), RDS, S3 optimized media, Docker locally (PostGIS + Redis). GitHub Actions for CI/CD across the monorepo. PM2 for process management in production.
Design workflow in Figma; UI/UX aligned with the cross-platform Tamagui design system.
Key features: JWT auth, profiles & portfolios, geolocation, favorites, notifications, multiple extended complex search, saved searches, moderation and recommendations.
Tech: Next.js 14, Expo, React Native, NestJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, PostGIS, Prisma, Redis, Socket.IO, Stripe, AWS, Docker, PM2, Figma, Tamagui, Turborepo, GitHub Actions

projects.name: Qwote
descriptions: AI-assisted IT quote generation SaaS — designed and built end-to-end.
Turns a project description (and documents) into a detailed professional estimate: hour breakdown, phases, timeline and PDF export in under a minute.
Multi-step AI pipeline orchestrated server-side: context validation, phase extraction, global estimate, hour allocation, technical analysis, scheduling — with retry, timeouts and token tracking.
AI agent assistant to optionally refine a quote, amend an existing estimate or guide the user through the whole quoting process, with structured prompts and persisted conversation state.
Export quotes as PDF files ready to share with clients.
Full product: social auth, Stripe credits & subscriptions, quote versioning, benchmarks, transactional emails, GDPR compliance, bilingual responsive UI.
Tech: React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, TanStack Query, Supabase (Auth, DB, Edge Functions Deno), OpenAI API, Stripe, i18next

projects.name: Quantique Workshop
descriptions: Immersive marketing website for Quantique Workshop — specialists in bespoke set design and custom decor for content creators, events, film and private clients (Villeurbanne, near Lyon).
Showcases their craft: immersive sets, 3D design, props, rental catalogue and made-to-measure creations — from first sketch to final installation.
Creative front-end experience with rich motion, scroll-driven storytelling and a polished brand presence.
Deployed with Coolify on self-hosted infrastructure.
Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, GSAP, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS

projects.name: Arpejio v1 & v2
descriptions: Web agency website for Arpejio — designed and rebuilt across two iterations (v1 & v2).
A showcase of creative development: complex animations, interactive UI and a distinctive digital identity for a software & digital solutions studio.
Motion-heavy landing experience with polished transitions and custom interactive components.
Tech: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

projects.name: Interax & Sport+
descriptions: RFID access control solution for a fitness group, developed independently in three parts:
Fitness group e-commerce website.
Custom web back-office for membership management, subscriptions and access control administration.
Desktop access control software for on-site terminals, with RFID reader integration.
UI built with Qt Designer for the desktop client; custom workflows for staff and club operators.
Tech: Symfony, PHP, Python, JavaScript, MySQL, SASS, Qt Designer, Adobe Illustrator

projects.name: Mapadora
descriptions: Travel assistant project split into three developments: web app, mobile app and REST API.
Express.js API with PostgreSQL and Sequelize; React web client and React Native mobile app sharing business logic.
API documented and tested with Swagger, Postman collections and Newman for automated runs.
GitLab CI/CD, Nginx reverse proxy, PM2 process management and Linux server deployment.
UI design in Figma; Material UI on the web front-end.
Tech: Node.js, Express.js, React, React Native, TypeScript, JavaScript, Material UI, PostgreSQL, Sequelize, Swagger, Postman, Newman, PM2, GitLab CI/CD, Figma, Nginx, Linux
